why: Security audits are required before any site goes live; the startup loop had no security-audit domain in the S9B launch QA gate, no structured runtime/site-level security checklist, and CI-level checks were absent from app-specific deploy workflows.

intended_outcome.statement: Every site progressing through the startup loop to launch is checked against a structured security baseline (OWASP top 10 runtime/headers, dependency CVEs, secrets, auth hardening, cookie security) before it goes live, with a hard gate preventing S9B→SIGNALS advance when critical security failures are present.
